answer.text: Both long call and long put option positions
Both short call and short put positions

explanation.text:
**The Logic:** Gamma is POSITIVE for ALL long (bought) options and NEGATIVE for all short (sold) options. - Long call: positive gamma - Long put: positive gamma - Short call: negative gamma - Short put: negative gamma
**The Trap:** Gamma sign depends on whether you are long or short, NOT on whether it is a call or put.
**Cross-Exam Context:** Positive gamma benefits from large moves. Negative gamma (writers) suffers from large moves.
**Key Takeaway:** Long options = positive gamma (benefit from moves). Short options = negative gamma (hurt by moves).
